diff: Pending changes may be cancelled for the following reasons: misalignment or conflict with the Sky Atlas or Spark Artifact; excessive or unacceptable risk, as identified by the Sky Core Council or Spark Risk Council; emergency situations, as defined in the Sky Atlas in [A.1.8 - Emergency Response System](1d940c6d-02ce-4c17-8057-cef13c1cc7ad); or cancellation requested by the Curator.
description:
Originating forum post: https://forum.skyeco.com/t/saep-13-risk-curation-framework/27796/1

**Do not merge unless associated poll passes**

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
